name: context-mode
description: MCP server for context-saving sandbox tools, session continuity, and automatic Codex hook routing.

interface.shortDescription: Context-saving MCP tools with Codex hooks
interface.longDescription: Context Mode adds sandboxed execution tools, indexed search, session continuity, and hook-based routing for Codex so large command and file outputs stay out of the conversation context.
defaultPrompt: Use context-mode routing for large outputs.
